overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime exploration of a rain-soaked cyberpunk city. The player walks through neon-lit rooftop food stalls, descends to dark urban streets beneath overpasses, passes illuminated advertisement corridors, and approaches a massive corporate skyscraper with towering neon-lit architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop food vendor terrace with neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through a rainy rooftop terrace with neon-lit food stalls, observing the vendor setups and distant city skyline

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the yellow food stall counter

entered.detail: food vendor stall with yellow base and red neon lighting
food stall with large illuminated digital menu screen displaying colorful graphics
tall vertical neon light pillar emitting warm yellow light
distant skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signs against night sky

segments.scene_description: The player stands on a rain-soaked rooftop terrace surrounded by neon-lit food stalls. A yellow vendor stall with red trim sits to the right while a vertical neon pillar illuminates the center area. The distant city skyline glows through the rain and haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark urban street beneath concrete overpass

events.description: descends from rooftop terrace to street level beneath an overpass
enters darker area under the overpass with reduced ambient light

agents.ego_description: walking down from the rooftop onto a dark asphalt street beneath a massive concrete overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the distance under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass spanning across the street overhead
wet asphalt road with double yellow center lines
dark building facade with illuminated windows on the left side

segments.scene_description: The player descends from the rooftop into a dark, enclosed street beneath a massive concrete overpass. The asphalt road stretches forward with double yellow lines, while a lone pedestrian walks ahead in the dimly lit tunnel-like space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with illuminated advertisement displays

events.description: turns left to follow the sidewalk along the building with illuminated billboards

agents.ego_description: walking along a covered sidewalk corridor lined with illuminated advertisements and graffiti-covered glass panels

entered.detail: series of large backlit advertisement displays showing various commercial graphics and text
glass panels covered in red and white graffiti tags and street art
pile of blue plastic trash bags accumulated on the sidewalk
concrete overhang structure covering the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a covered sidewalk corridor where illuminated advertisement panels and graffiti-covered glass line the left side. Blue trash bags sit on the wet concrete as the path continues under an overhead concrete structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide avenue leading to corporate plaza with mega-skyscraper

events.description: tilts camera upward to view the towering skyscrapers between the narrow building canyon
exits the narrow corridor into a wide open avenue with view of distant mega-building

agents.ego_description: tilting head up to gaze at the towering residential skyscraper, then continuing down the wide avenue toward the illuminated corporate plaza

entered.detail: immense glass and steel residential tower rising between buildings with green illuminated sections
massive corporate skyscraper in the distance with prominent pink and red neon lighting
dense network of overhead cables and power lines crisscrossing between buildings
illuminated sign for Cambria on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The player tilts their view upward to marvel at a towering glass residential skyscraper rising in a narrow canyon between buildings. Continuing forward, the scene opens into a wide avenue where a massive corporate building with pink neon lights dominates the distant skyline, while overhead power lines crisscross above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, rain-soaked rooftop terrace down into the oppressive depths of a neon-lit urban canyon. It begins amidst glowing food stalls and vertical neon pillars on a rooftop, where the distant city skyline shimmers through a hazy rain. As the camera descends, the open air gives way to a dark, enclosed street beneath a massive concrete overpass, following a lone pedestrian along a wet asphalt road. The scene then shifts into a covered sidewalk corridor lined with illuminated advertisement panels and graffiti-covered glass before the view tilts upward to reveal a towering residential skyscraper. Finally, the path opens into a wide avenue where overhead power lines crisscross the sky and a massive corporate building with pink neon lights dominates the distant horizon.
